notes: Help service content should direct users to email support@fermatmind.com for support contact.
This decision removes the /help/contact-support route as a publish-blocking requirement for the current Help service content train.
Any public route such as /support may remain a separate product navigation surface, but this task does not require or modify it.

blocker_resolution_mapping.remaining_gate: Apply the email-contact decision to the revised local package/import package in HELP-CONTENT-DRAFT-POLICY-REVISION-APPLY-01, then sync CMS drafts only after explicit CMS mutation authorization.
HELP-CMS-SERVICE-FIELDS-01 should add or verify first-class support_contact authority before publish preflight.
Verify visible FAQ to JSON-LD equality only after policy/contact revisions are applied and schema authority is available.

recommended_pr_train.purpose: Add or verify first-class CMS fields needed for support_contact, policy_version, reviewer, faq_items, and schema_enabled authority.
Apply policy-owner answers and the direct-email support decision to the local revised v01 Help package/import artifact without CMS writes.
Sync the policy/contact-updated package to the existing 12 Help CMS drafts while preserving draft/non-public/non-indexable/unpublished state.
Run second read-only operator review request after policy answers and contact-support handling are applied.
Enable or harden Help FAQ schema only from visible CMS/backend FAQ authority.
Run publish preflight over CMS draft state, support contact, schema, canonical paths, sitemap/llms, and private URL guards.
Publish the 12 Help ContentPage drafts only after exact publish authorization.
Verify public 200s, canonical paths, schema, sitemap/llms exposure, and private URL guardrails after publish.
